creator: dohzono@gmail.com
text:
I don't have gnome environment, but getproxygnome is required?

$ cd /usr/ports/java/eclipse/
$ make WITHOUT_MOZILLA=yes WITHOUT_GNOMEVFS=yes WITHOUT_CAIRO=yes install
